title: Dynamics of Respiration
abstract:
Abstract
                  The sections in this article are:
                  
                    Equation of Motion
                    
                      Application of Equation of Motion to a Model
                    
                    
                      Determination of Resistance and Compliance
                    
                    
                      Inertance and Reactance
                    
                    
                      Impedance
                    
                    
                      Time Constant
                    
                    
                      Nonlinear Resistance and Hysteresis
                    
                    
                      Application of Equation of Motion to the Respiratory System
                    
                  
                  
                    Applied Pressures
                    
                      Relationship to Lung Volume
                    
                    
                      Tidal Breathing
                    
                  
                  
                    Opposing Pressures
                    
                      Flow Resistance
                    
                  
                  
                    Maximal Expiratory Flow
                    
                      Gas Compression and Measurement of Flow‐Volume Curves
                    
                  
                  
                    Dynamics of Breathing
                    
                      Breathing at Rest and During Exercise
                    
                    
                      Factors Affecting Respiratory Dynamics
